root.update_contents: <FlowDocument FontFamily="Microsoft YaHei UI" FontSize="14" LineHeight="14" PagePadding="5,0,5,0" AllowDrop="False" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1.2.0 (2026-03-22)</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 修复：ShareEditPage->DataGrid->单击MenuContext无响应的问题。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">2. 更新：将更新源Sourceforge切换为Gitee。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">3. 修复：前端TransmitView预览图片时，图片索引异常。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">4. 更新：增加上传文件自动分类功能。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">5. 更新：前端页面增加启用或禁用后端自动分类的功能。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">6. 修复：在分享编辑页面选中文件在资源管理器中打开时，若文件不存在，无任何提示。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1.1.2 (2026-03-15)</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 修复：软件开机自启动时无法正确加载数据库和密钥。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1.1.1 (2026-03-14)</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 修复：前端ShareView页面文件路径导航异常。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">2. 修复：离线状态下前端页面的Fluent图标显示异常。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="9.333333333333334"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1.1.0 (2026-03-13)</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 更新：重构前端页面，支持图标、列表两种显示模式，优化了图片预览功能。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">2. 更新：重构后端服务器，所有页面在同一窗口内显示，不再创建新的窗口。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">3. 更新：新增支持分享文件夹、自动检查更新、上传时指定保存路径等，删除了多语言支持。</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="9.333333333333334"><Run FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="#FFFFA500" Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1.0.0 (2026-02-02)</Run></Paragraph><Paragraph LineHeight="8.166666666666668"><Run Background="#00FFFFFF" xml:lang="zh-cn" NumberSubstitution.CultureSource="User">1. 更新：发行版发布。</Run></Paragraph></FlowDocument>
